title: The Soul.
content:
When once the soul has lost her way,
    O then how restless does she stray!
    And having not her God for light,
    How does she err in endless night!
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Soul."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
